law.text:
Artikel 1. Definities

par. 1. Voor de toepassing van deze wet wordt verstaan onder:

(1) vreemdeling: al wie het bewijs niet levert dat hij de Belgische nationaliteit bezit.

(3) onderdaan van een derde land: eenieder die geen burger van de Unie is en die geen persoon is die onder het gemeenschapsrecht inzake vrij verkeer valt, als bepaald in artikel 2, punt 5, van de Schengengrenscode.

(4) illegaal verblijf: de aanwezigheid op het grondgebied van een vreemdeling die niet of niet langer voldoet aan de voorwaarden voor de toegang tot of het verblijf op het grondgebied.

(11) risico op onderduiken: het feit dat er redenen bestaan om aan te nemen dat een vreemdeling die het voorwerp uitmaakt van een verwijderingsprocedure, een procedure voor toekenning van internationale bescherming of een procedure tot vaststelling van of tot overdracht naar de lidstaat die verantwoordelijk is voor de behandeling van het verzoek om internationale bescherming, met het oog op de criteria die opgesomd worden in paragraaf 2 zal onderduiken.

(14) geïdentificeerde vreemdeling: iedere vreemdeling:
(a) die in het bezit is van een geldig reisdocument, een geldig paspoort of een geldig identiteitsdocument; of
(b) die werd erkend als onderdaan door de nationale overheid van zijn land, die zich bereid verklaarde een doorlaatbewijs af te leveren; of
(c) die valt onder de categorie nationaliteiten waarvoor de minister zelf een doorlaatbewijs kan afleveren.

par. 2. Het in paragraaf 1, (11), bedoelde risico op onderduiken moet actueel en reëel zijn. Het wordt na een individueel onderzoek en op basis van een of meer van de volgende objectieve criteria vastgesteld, rekening houdend met alle omstandigheden die eigen zijn aan elk geval:

(1) De betrokkene heeft na zijn illegale binnenkomst of tijdens zijn illegaal verblijf geen verblijfsaanvraag ingediend, of heeft zijn verzoek om internationale bescherming niet binnen de door deze wet voorziene termijn gedaan.

(2) De betrokkene heeft in het kader van een procedure voor internationale bescherming, verblijf, verwijdering of terugdrijving valse of misleidende informatie of valse of vervalste documenten gebruikt, of heeft fraude gepleegd of andere onwettige middelen gebruikt.

(3) De betrokkene werkt niet mee of heeft niet meegewerkt in het kader van zijn betrekkingen met de overheden die belast zijn met de uitvoering van en/of het toezicht op de naleving van de reglementering inzake de toegang tot het grondgebied, het verblijf, de vestiging en de verwijdering van vreemdelingen.

(4) De betrokkene heeft duidelijk gemaakt dat hij zich niet aan een van de volgende maatregelen wil houden of heeft zich reeds niet aan een van deze maatregelen gehouden:
(a) een overdrachts-, terugdrijvings- of verwijderingsmaatregel;
(b) een inreisverbod dat noch opgeheven, noch opgeschort is;
(c) een minder dwingende maatregel dan een vrijheidsberovende maatregel die erop gericht is om zijn overdracht, terugdrijving of zijn verwijdering te garanderen, ongeacht of het om een vrijheidsbeperkende maatregel of een andere maatregel gaat;
(d) een vrijheidsbeperkende maatregel die erop gericht is om de openbare orde of de nationale veiligheid te garanderen;
(e) een door een andere lidstaat genomen maatregel die gelijkwaardig is aan de maatregelen bedoeld in (a), (b), (c) of (d).

(5) De betrokkene maakt het voorwerp uit van een inreisverbod in het Rijk en/of in een andere lidstaat dat noch opgeheven, noch opgeschort werd.

(6) De betrokkene heeft onmiddellijk na het voorwerp te hebben uitgemaakt van een beslissing tot weigering van binnenkomst of verblijf of een beslissing die een einde heeft gemaakt aan zijn verblijf, of onmiddellijk na het voorwerp te hebben uitgemaakt van een terugdrijvings- of verwijderingsmaatregel, een nieuwe verblijfsaanvraag of een nieuw verzoek om internationale bescherming ingediend.

(7) Terwijl hij in verband met dat punt ondervraagd werd, heeft de betrokkene verborgen dat hij zijn vingerafdrukken reeds heeft gegeven in een andere Staat die gebonden is door de Europese reglementering met betrekking tot de bepaling van de Staat die verantwoordelijk is voor de behandeling van een verzoek om internationale bescherming, na een verzoek om internationale bescherming te hebben ingediend.

(8) De betrokkene heeft in het Rijk of in een of meerdere andere lidstaten meerdere verzoeken om internationale bescherming en/of verblijfsaanvragen ingediend, die aanleiding hebben gegeven tot een negatieve beslissing of die niet tot de afgifte van een verblijfstitel hebben geleid.

(9) Terwijl hij in verband met dat punt ondervraagd werd, heeft de betrokkene verborgen dat hij vroeger reeds een verzoek om internationale bescherming heeft ingediend in een andere staat die gebonden is door de Europese reglementering met betrekking tot de bepaling van de staat die verantwoordelijk is voor de behandeling van een verzoek om internationale bescherming.

(10) De betrokkene heeft verklaard of uit zijn dossier blijkt dat hij voor andere doeleinden dan de doeleinden waarvoor hij een verzoek om internationale bescherming of een verblijfsaanvraag heeft ingediend naar het Rijk gekomen is.

(11) De betrokkene maakt het voorwerp uit van een geldboete omdat hij een kennelijk onrechtmatig beroep heeft ingediend bij de Raad voor Vreemdelingenbetwistingen.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  type MemberState
  type Authority
  holds_belgian_nationality: Person -> Bool
  is_foreigner: Person -> Bool
  is_citizen_of_union: Person -> Bool
  falls_under_community_free_movement_law: Person -> Bool
  is_third_country_national: Person -> Bool
  present_on_territory: Person -> Bool
  meets_access_conditions: Person -> Bool
  meets_residence_conditions: Person -> Bool
  satisfies_access_or_residence_conditions: Person -> Bool
  is_in_illegal_residence: Person -> Bool
  has_valid_travel_document: Person -> Bool
  has_valid_passport: Person -> Bool
  has_valid_identity_document: Person -> Bool
  recognised_as_national_by_own_authority: Person -> Bool
  own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer: Person -> Bool
  falls_under_nationality_category_for_direct_laissez_passer: Person -> Bool
  is_identified_foreigner: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_removal_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_international_protection_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_responsible_member_state_procedure: Person -> Bool
  individual_examination_performed: Person -> Bool
  objective_criteria_indicate_absconding: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding: Person -> Bool
  did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_residence: Person -> Bool
  did_not_submit_international_protection_request_in_time: Person -> Bool
  no_application_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  used_false_or_misleading_information: Person -> Bool
  used_false_or_falsified_documents: Person -> Bool
  committed_fraud: Person -> Bool
  used_other_unlawful_means: Person -> Bool
  false_information_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  does_not_cooperate_with_authorities: Person -> Bool
  non_cooperation_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_refoulement_removal: Person -> Bool
  indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure: Person -> Bool
  indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_freedom_restricting_measure_for_public_order: Person -> Bool
  indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_measure_by_other_member_state: Person -> Bool
  non_compliance_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_state: Person -> Bool
  entry_ban_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision: Person -> Bool
  new_application_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state: Person -> Bool
  concealed_fingerprints_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome: Person -> Bool
  multiple_applications_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_application_in_other_state: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_application_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  came_for_other_purposes_than_stated_in_application: Person -> Bool
  other_purposes_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal: Person -> Bool
  manifestly_unfounded_appeal_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person: ((~holds_belgian_nationality(p))) => ((is_foreigner(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((~is_citizen_of_union(p)) & (~falls_under_community_free_movement_law(p)))) => ((is_third_country_national(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((meets_access_conditions(p))) => ((satisfies_access_or_residence_conditions(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((meets_residence_conditions(p))) => ((satisfies_access_or_residence_conditions(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((present_on_territory(p)) & (~satisfies_access_or_residence_conditions(p)))) => ((is_in_illegal_residence(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((has_valid_travel_document(p))) => ((is_identified_foreigner(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((has_valid_passport(p))) => ((is_identified_foreigner(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((has_valid_identity_document(p))) => ((is_identified_foreigner(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((recognised_as_national_by_own_authority(p)) & (own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer(p)))) => ((is_identified_foreigner(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((falls_under_nationality_category_for_direct_laissez_passer(p))) => ((is_identified_foreigner(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((subject_to_removal_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_international_protection_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_responsible_member_state_procedure(p)))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((no_application_criterion_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((false_information_criterion_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_cooperation_criterion_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliance_criterion_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((entry_ban_criterion_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((new_application_criterion_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_fingerprints_criterion_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((multiple_applications_criterion_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_application_criterion_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((other_purposes_criterion_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((manifestly_unfounded_appeal_criterion_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p)) & (objective_criteria_indicate_absconding(p)) & (individual_examination_performed(p)) & (risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))) => ((objective_criteria_indicate_absconding(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_residence(p)) | (did_not_submit_international_protection_request_in_time(p)))) => ((no_application_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((used_false_or_misleading_information(p)) | (used_false_or_falsified_documents(p)) | (committed_fraud(p)) | (used_other_unlawful_means(p)))) => ((false_information_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((does_not_cooperate_with_authorities(p))) => ((non_cooperation_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_refoulement_removal(p))) => ((non_compliance_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_entry_ban(p))) => ((non_compliance_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure(p))) => ((non_compliance_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_freedom_restricting_measure_for_public_order(p))) => ((non_compliance_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_measure_by_other_member_state(p))) => ((non_compliance_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom(p)) | (subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_state(p)))) => ((entry_ban_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision(p))) => ((new_application_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state(p))) => ((concealed_fingerprints_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome(p))) => ((multiple_applications_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_application_in_other_state(p))) => ((concealed_prior_application_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((came_for_other_purposes_than_stated_in_application(p))) => ((other_purposes_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal(p))) => ((manifestly_unfounded_appeal_criterion_met(p))).
}

case.text: Sofie legt een geldige Belgische identiteitskaart voor en bewijst daarmee dat zij de Belgische nationaliteit bezit.

questions.text: Valt Sofie onder de definitie van een vreemdeling in artikel 1, paragraaf 1, punt 1?

expected.reason: If the person proves Belgian nationality, the statutory definition of foreigner is not met.

holds_belgian_nationality.name: holds_belgian_nationality
holds_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they hold Belgian nationality.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_citizen_of_union.name: is_citizen_of_union
is_citizen_of_union.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

falls_under_community_free_movement_law.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
falls_under_community_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a national of a third country: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

present_on_territory.name: present_on_territory
present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

meets_access_conditions.name: meets_access_conditions
meets_access_conditions.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to the territory as determined by applicable law.

meets_residence_conditions.name: meets_residence_conditions
meets_residence_conditions.description: The person satisfies the conditions for residence on the territory as determined by applicable law.

satisfies_access_or_residence_conditions.name: satisfies_access_or_residence_conditions
satisfies_access_or_residence_conditions.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory: meets access conditions or meets residence conditions.

is_in_illegal_residence.name: is_in_illegal_residence
is_in_illegal_residence.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without satisfying access or residence conditions.

has_valid_travel_document.name: has_valid_travel_document
has_valid_travel_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document.

has_valid_passport.name: has_valid_passport
has_valid_passport.description: The person is in possession of a valid passport.

has_valid_identity_document.name: has_valid_identity_document
has_valid_identity_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_own_authority.name: recognised_as_national_by_own_authority
recognised_as_national_by_own_authority.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country.

own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_p.name: own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_p.description: The national authority of the person's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_under_nationality_category_for_dir.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_direct_laissez_passer
falls_under_nationality_category_for_dir.description: The person falls under a category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer directly.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The person is an identified foreigner based on one of the legally defined identification grounds.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_responsible_member_state_proc.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_procedure
subject_to_responsible_member_state_proc.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the member state responsible for examining the application for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination has been performed taking into account all circumstances specific to the case.

objective_criteria_indicate_absconding.name: objective_criteria_indicate_absconding
objective_criteria_indicate_absconding.description: One or more objective criteria established in paragraph 2 give reasons to believe the foreigner will abscond.

risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding is current and real.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner based on the legally defined conditions.

did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_residence
did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.description: The foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence.

did_not_submit_international_protection_.name: did_not_submit_international_protection_request_in_time
did_not_submit_international_protection_.description: The foreigner did not submit a request for international protection within the period provided by the law.

no_application_criterion_met.name: no_application_criterion_met
no_application_criterion_met.description: The no-application criterion is met: the foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence, or did not submit a request for international protection within the legal period.

used_false_or_misleading_information.name: used_false_or_misleading_information
used_false_or_misleading_information.description: The foreigner used false or misleading information in the context of a relevant procedure.

used_false_or_falsified_documents.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents
used_false_or_falsified_documents.description: The foreigner used false or falsified documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud.name: committed_fraud
committed_fraud.description: The foreigner committed fraud in the context of a relevant procedure.

used_other_unlawful_means.name: used_other_unlawful_means
used_other_unlawful_means.description: The foreigner used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

false_information_criterion_met.name: false_information_criterion_met
false_information_criterion_met.description: The false-information criterion is met: the foreigner used false or misleading information, false documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

non_cooperation_criterion_met.name: non_cooperation_criterion_met
non_cooperation_criterion_met.description: The non-cooperation criterion is met: the foreigner does not cooperate with the relevant authorities.

indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_t.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_refoulement_removal
indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_t.description: The foreigner has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, refoulement, or removal measure.

indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_e.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_entry_ban
indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_e.description: The foreigner has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_l.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_l.description: The foreigner has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refoulement, or removal.

indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_f.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_freedom_restricting_measure_for_public_order
indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_f.description: The foreigner has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a freedom-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_e.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_measure_by_other_member_state
indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_e.description: The foreigner has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with an equivalent measure taken by another member state.

non_compliance_criterion_met.name: non_compliance_criterion_met
non_compliance_criterion_met.description: The non-compliance criterion is met based on one or more of the legally defined non-compliance grounds.

subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom
subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_sta.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_sta.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in another member state that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

entry_ban_criterion_met.name: entry_ban_criterion_met
entry_ban_criterion_met.description: The entry-ban criterion is met: the foreigner is subject to an active entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another member state.

submitted_new_application_after_negative.name: submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_after_negative.description: The foreigner submitted a new residence application or new request for international protection immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, ending residence, or a refoulement or removal measure.

new_application_criterion_met.name: new_application_criterion_met
new_application_criterion_met.description: The new-application criterion is met: the foreigner submitted a new application immediately after a negative decision.

concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state.name: concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state.description: The foreigner, while being questioned on that point, concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another state bound by the European regulations on determining the state responsible for examining a request for international protection.

concealed_fingerprints_criterion_met.name: concealed_fingerprints_criterion_met
concealed_fingerprints_criterion_met.description: The concealed-fingerprints criterion is met: the foreigner concealed prior fingerprint provision in another bound state.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The foreigner has submitted multiple requests for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other member states that have resulted in a negative decision or have not led to the issuance of a residence permit.

multiple_applications_criterion_met.name: multiple_applications_criterion_met
multiple_applications_criterion_met.description: The multiple-applications criterion is met: the foreigner submitted multiple applications with negative outcomes.

concealed_prior_application_in_other_sta.name: concealed_prior_application_in_other_state
concealed_prior_application_in_other_sta.description: The foreigner, while being questioned on that point, concealed that they had previously submitted a request for international protection in another state bound by the European regulations on determining the state responsible.

concealed_prior_application_criterion_me.name: concealed_prior_application_criterion_met
concealed_prior_application_criterion_me.description: The concealed-prior-application criterion is met: the foreigner concealed a prior application in another bound state.

came_for_other_purposes_than_stated_in_a.name: came_for_other_purposes_than_stated_in_application
came_for_other_purposes_than_stated_in_a.description: The foreigner has declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a request for international protection or a residence application.

other_purposes_criterion_met.name: other_purposes_criterion_met
other_purposes_criterion_met.description: The other-purposes criterion is met: the foreigner came for purposes other than those stated in their application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The foreigner is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

manifestly_unfounded_appeal_criterion_me.name: manifestly_unfounded_appeal_criterion_met
manifestly_unfounded_appeal_criterion_me.description: The manifestly-unfounded-appeal criterion is met: the foreigner is subject to a fine for a manifestly unlawful appeal.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria defined in paragraph 2 is met for the foreigner.
